title: NICE NG28 2026 update: CKD and cardiorenal sequencing after metformin
text: For adults with type 2 diabetes and chronic kidney disease, NICE NG28 prioritizes SGLT2 inhibitors after metformin when renal function and clinical context allow. The 2026 update also reviewed medicines for people with no relevant comorbidities and common comorbidities.

title: ADA Standards of Care 2025: obesity-aware escalation after metformin
text: ADA Standards of Care 2025 support GLP-1 receptor agonists when additional weight loss and cardiometabolic benefit are priorities after metformin.

title: ADA Standards of Care 2025: cardiorenal-first add-on therapy
text: ADA Standards of Care 2025 prioritize SGLT2 inhibitors for heart failure and chronic kidney disease and favor incretin-based therapy with cardiovascular benefit when atherosclerotic risk and weight management are central treatment goals.

title: NICE NG28 2026 update: lower-cost add-on options
text: For adults without a dominant cardiorenal indication, NICE NG28 includes individualized add-on options such as DPP-4 inhibitors, pioglitazone, or sulfonylureas, with cost, hypoglycemia risk, and weight effects considered explicitly.

title: ADA Standards of Care 2025: insulin initiation for marked hyperglycemia
text: ADA Standards of Care 2025 support insulin initiation when hyperglycemia is severe, catabolic features are present, or rapid glycemic control is needed while longer-term therapy is being established.
